description: Scaffold a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server from a name, description, and tool list. Produces a self-contained Node.js project with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, ready to install and run.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Slug-cased name for the new MCP server (lowercase, hyphens). Becomes the directory name.

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: One-sentence description of what this MCP server does.

inputs.name: tools
inputs.description: Array of tool definitions: [{name, description, inputSchema?}]. Each becomes a registered tool on the MCP server with a placeholder handler the user fills in.

inputs.name: outputDir
inputs.description: Where to create the MCP server. Defaults to './mcps/<name>/' relative to the cwd.

inputs.name: transport
inputs.description: MCP transport: 'stdio' (default — most common for desktop clients) or 'http'.

outputs.name: path
outputs.description: Absolute path to the created MCP server directory.

outputs.name: entry
outputs.description: Path to the main server file.

outputs.name: filesCreated
outputs.description: Every file the skill wrote, relative to the project root.

outputs.name: runCommand
outputs.description: Shell command to install deps and start the server.

outputs.name: nextSteps
outputs.description: Ordered manual steps the user must do next (replace placeholder handlers, register with their MCP client, etc.).
